risk_justification: Southern Hemisphere winter storm belt - frequent gale-force winds June-August
Peak typhoon season corridor - Category 3-5 storms historically recorded August-October
SW monsoon season - cyclone formation zone active June-September
North Atlantic winter storm corridor - extreme wave heights December-February
Sheltered equatorial strait - calm year-round with minimal seasonal variation
SW monsoon onset - strong winds and heavy swell in Arabian Sea June-September
Mediterranean summer - stable high pressure system - minimal wave activity
Roaring Forties/Furious Fifties - year-round extreme conditions - most dangerous sea passage
Summer shamal winds - dust storms reduce visibility - moderate sea state
Winter ice formation in northern Baltic - icebreaker assistance may be required
